_comment: Synthetic eval cases. All data is fabricated — no real Vespa/arXiv dependency.

cases.query: What is LightRAG and how does it work?
cases.notes: General intro query; relevant chunks are intro + abstract + claim

cases.query: Describe the dual-level retrieval method in LightRAG
cases.notes: Specific method query; only chunk-a2 is relevant

cases.query: What are the benchmark results and performance numbers?
cases.notes: Performance/numbers query; relevant chunks are experiments + performance_fact

cases.query: How does the attention mechanism work in transformers?
cases.notes: Transformer attention query; relevant chunks from document 2

cases.query: What BLEU score does the transformer achieve on translation?
cases.notes: Specific metric query; only chunk-a6 is relevant
Definition query; chunk-a7 is the glossary definition, chunk-a1 also mentions RAG

cases.query: How does LightRAG compare to GraphRAG in memory usage?
cases.notes: Comparison query; chunk-a8 has memory stats, chunk-a3 also mentions GraphRAG

cases.query: What graph-based indexing approach does LightRAG use for multi-hop reasoning?
cases.notes: Multi-hop reasoning query; claim + intro + method are all relevant
CROSS-CHAT LEAKAGE TEST: query from Chat B. chat-b1 has similar keywords to chat-a chunks. FakeVespa must filter by chat_id so chunk-a* never appear.
